main.description: An on-chain proposal's off-chain content. Created before the on-chain call, linked via atprotoUri. Contains the human-readable details of what's being proposed.

description.description: Detailed description of what's being proposed, scope, deliverables, etc.

discussionTopicUri.description: If this proposal originated from a discussion, the topic ID (e.g., 'task:42' or 'discussion:...').

productionStage.description: Creative production stage this proposal belongs to.

artifactType.description: Primary artifact this proposal expects to create, review, or improve.

feedbackTargetUri.description: Optional artifact, discussion, task, pilot, or release URI this proposal is responding to.

aiAssistDisclosure.description: Optional disclosure of AI tools, models, or generated material involved in the work.

budget.description: Requested budget as a string (to preserve BigInt precision). '0' means equity-only.

tokenWeightBps.description: Requested ProjectToken allocation in basis points.

deadlineDays.description: Claim deadline in days from creation.

review.description: Optional review configuration: acceptance criteria, evidence requirements, expectations, and dispute escalation path.

reviewContract.description: Review configuration for accepting or disputing a proposed task.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Specific conditions that must be met for the proposal deliverables to be considered accepted.

evidenceRequired.description: Types of proof or documentation the contributor must provide, such as screenshots, test results, external links, or ATProto records.

reviewerExpectations.description: Guidance for reviewers on how to evaluate the submission, including quality standards or review process details.

disputePath.description: How to escalate a review disagreement, such as a DAO vote link, arbitrator DID, or dispute topic URI.
